faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

college_info.college_name: Midnapore City College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Midnapore City College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Midnapore City College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and Science. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., BBA and BMLT. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Midnapore City College offers M.Sc. The fees for Midnapore City College courses range between INR 48,000 to 1,56,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Hospital Management - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College campus is very good.

review_content.Placements: 3% of students got placed from our college. The highest salary is Rs. 25,000- Rs. 35,000 per month and the lowest salary is Rs. 12,000 per month. Recruiting companies are Apollo, Sanjivani, etc. All students in this course got internships from our college. Roles offered are business administration, hospital superintendent, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good and college provide various facilities to students. Department follows rules. Every classroom has a projector and speaker system. Every department has computer lab. Hostel facility is not available in our college. College has canteen and food quality is very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Hospital Management - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is good.

review_content.Placements: There are no college campus placements. The college refers only some companies names. The placement system is continuing the refferal system. Everyone cannot get a job or chance to get a job, because college does not provided on campus placements or any type of program.
review_content.Infrastructure: Buildings are normal but there is no hostel facility. The college does not provide a Wi-Fi facility to students on campus. It provides a library but it's very small. All books are not available in the library. The librarian cannot find the books they told to find online.

review_summary.college_name: Midnapore City College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nutrition - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good. Faculty is understanding and helpful.

content.Placements: Most of the students got placed from our course. The college, especially our department, gives internship facilities in the 4th semester. Just after or after the completion of the course, students have opportunities for a job. Teachers can help us improve our knowledge about internships.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and infrastructure are available for our department, like labs for experiments, classrooms that are clean, and library facilities are good. They maintain college hygiene and sanitation. Regular cleaning of classrooms, bathrooms, and the campus. Canteen facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nutrition - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Amazing college with a campus and understanding teachers

content.Placements: The maximum number of students get their internship and pass out with great numbers. 80%-90% of students got internships from my course. In many industries of food technology and nutrition professions, they enjoy their jobs and are grateful for choosing this course.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is very clean and properly maintained in terms of hygiene and sanitation. Delicious food is also available. Many programmes have been celebrated on campus. Very enjoyable moment, and many types of seminars and courses are conducted by the college and faculty for development and to increase students' knowledge.

individual_reviews.title: College campus is very good.

content.Placements: 3% of students got placed from our college. The highest salary is Rs. 25,000- Rs. 35,000 per month and the lowest salary is Rs. 12,000 per month. Recruiting companies are Apollo, Sanjivani, etc. All students in this course got internships from our college. Roles offered are business administration, hospital superintendent, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good and college provide various facilities to students. Department follows rules. Every classroom has a projector and speaker system. Every department has computer lab. Hostel facility is not available in our college. College has canteen and food quality is very good.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Hospital Management - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good.

content.Placements: There are no college campus placements. The college refers only some companies names. The placement system is continuing the refferal system. Everyone cannot get a job or chance to get a job, because college does not provided on campus placements or any type of program.
content.Infrastructure: Buildings are normal but there is no hostel facility. The college does not provide a Wi-Fi facility to students on campus. It provides a library but it's very small. All books are not available in the library. The librarian cannot find the books they told to find online.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied about infrastructure, facilities & faculty.

content.Placements: First of all, my college only gives internships for my course. There is no placement for my BMLT course, not sure about other courses. But 100% of students in my course will be getting internships in hospitals. Seniors also confirmed that. Roles offered in my course are lab technician. Thanks.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities: Good laboratories for every department. Neat and clean, also a very calm environment. Classes have Wi-Fi coverage. Classrooms are very neat, cleaned every day. Currently, we have a library in our department building, but there is a whole new 4-storey library being built & will be ready by mid-2025. Our college does have a hostel, but we have a canteen, which gives value-for-money foods for students. The taste is also good, but prices are sometimes a little bit extra. College provides medical facilities for every student & faculty. We have an annual sports event where every student can participate.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is present on every floor, and different types of labs are present for different purposes (like anatomy & physiology, immunology, hematology, etc.). Classrooms are easy to find, with a good atmosphere, but there are no hostels; you should have to rent a room.

reviews.review_heading: I am a student at this college.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. On the college campus, Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are medium-sized and well-furnished. In the middle of the college campus, there is a central library. The labs are large and all the necessary facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: This review helps everyone.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is wonderful. Labs are very clean and medium-sized. Classrooms are of medium size. Wi-Fi is not available for students. The college has a big library. Canteen food is good but hygienic. Medical facilities are available 24 hours a day, regardless of the situation.

reviews.review_heading: This review may be helpful for everyone.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is not good either. The college provides some facilities like a canteen, a library, and a playground. In a library, all books are not available at the same time in the college. The college does not provide a boys or girls hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am a student in this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very beautiful and our full campus is covered by green stress. Wi-Fi is not available for students. Classrooms are medium-sized and clean. The labs are good, and there are all types of facilities available. For our college students, there are two separate hostels for girls & boys.

reviews.review_heading: I am a student at this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is beautiful. All the facilities our department provides. The labs are well-equipped and clean. Classrooms are so large. Canteen food is so tasty and hygienic. Hostels are separate for boys and girls. Medical facilities always provide us with.

reviews.review_heading: I am a student at Brainware University.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is really good. The college provides many facilities like a playground, parking area, library, and canteen. The college provides boys' and girls' hostels. All books are available in the college library. The college has also provided medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good for study and future, and it provided huge placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: The college has a library, Wi-Fi, and a canteen, but the hostel in under construction. The main facilities are available in our college. It has an ATM, cold water in summer, projectors etc. The college is near the high-way. The campus has a gym, indoor games and grounds as well.

reviews.review_heading: This is a nice college, and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The college has a big central library that occupies the whole building. The ground floor is for books, the 1st and 2nd floors are for study, and the 3rd floor is a smart e-learning centre. There are two big study rooms for students. Unlimited free Wi-Fi is available, and it's nice. The library teacher is friendly and has a nice personality.

review_content.Placements: 100 seats are available in the college It doesnt offer any package for ug's Our career will be strong if we do our pg and can go to abroad for better The internship is provided inside the college and they give 2000 per month All pg courses are available in the college
review_content.Infrastructure: Each classroom is having 3 ACs and there is a projector through which proffersors teach Library is centralised AC and it is common for mbbs bds and nursing There is no wifi available in the campus The labs were also good by having every equipment The hostel was very bad that many people lives outside the hostel The food tastes average Canteen food is good There is hospital inside the campus There will be sports week in a year where they keep games like cricket , basketball, volley ball, throwball , etc...

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Do not join mamata dental college khammam. College is ruled with harassment and fear.

review_content.Placements: No placements as boosted in many reviews. Placements are just baited for the parents to join their kids into this college. In fact, they do not even conduct any workshops/ sessions to help students.
review_content.Infrastructure: In Khammam's Mamata dental college, the Patient count is very low. To mitigate this low count, they adapt cheap methods like writing dummy patient records, making the interns write dummy patient records, and show them during college inspections. The actual count is roughly about 1/3 rd of what is shown. The college runs under the micromanagement of a Woman (who is Dean's wife and also a professor of Conservative dentistry), who do not encourage any skill enhancement programs. She manages the students & staff with constant threats and fears. No new clinical skill is encouraged in the college. As the students are kept under constant fear they do not even think of asking for new learning and skills. This will make them very underskilled after their graduation, as they do not stand the competition from other college pass-outs. Girls hostel members are treated like prisoners. The warden is a professor of Conservative dentistry who threatens to fail girls due to personal grudges of the hostel. There are also rumours that few students committed suicide due to her extreme harassment, but they are not brought to the limelight due to their political influence. Outings are not given, due to which we girls faced problems in buying basic personal hygiene stuff, but still, the warden just don't care.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: St. Mary's Group of Institutions offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech and B.Pharma. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. St. Mary's Group of Institutions fee structure ranges between INR 44,700 to 2,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by St. Mary's Group of Institutions are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at St. Mary's Group of Institutions goes up to 3985.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at St. Mary's Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer:
A:    St. Mary's Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination.

Candidate  must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject.

Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognized as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.

Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.B.PharmaCandidates must have completed 16 years of Age by the date of commencement of Admissions or on such other date as may be notified by the CET Committee. There is no upper age limit.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is really satisfied with faculty members and fee structure.

review_content.Placements: More than 30 companies are offered in college. The highest package is 13 LPA. Above 40% of students are placed on campus placements. The faculty also fully helps us with placements. In this college, the management has already trained the students for placements. We can get jobs easily but the package is less.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice. More than 10 buildings are there. Mess quality is neat and good. Hostel has a homely feel. High security is there in college and has a gym. There is a swimming pool for the campus hostel students and it is always clean and neat. Many workers are there, if any problem is there solve it fastly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'm dissatisfied with teaching techniques and very low placement records.

review_content.Placements: With all my experience and senior students' advice, only about 10% of outgoing students are able to secure jobs with a CTC ranging from 2.5 LPA being the least and 10 LPA the highest, till the recent pass-out batch of B.Tech graduates. Dell, Deloitte, HP, TCS, Zomato, Accenture, IBM, and some startup companies are the top recruiters of our college. Many students have only a choice to work in BPO or telecaller customer service jobs. There are no internships at all. Only Computer Science courses, with AI, ML, and CS are provided in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has no Wi-Fi for students and even labs with minimum equipment with the majority of them are not properly under working conditions. No Wi-Fi connection is available for computer system in any computer labs. Only 80% of class strength can be accommodated in any lab, and library with no proper books or materials available. The quality of hostel food is average. No encouragement for the 1st and 2nd year students in sports activities. I've not seen any sick room or first aid room not even any medicine for students with sickness they just tell to go hospital.

Dell, Deloitte, HP, TCS, Zomato, Accenture, IBM, and some startup companies are the top recruiters of our college. Many students have only a choice to work in BPO or telecaller customer service jobs. There are no internships at all. Only Computer Science courses, with AI, ML, and CS are provided in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has no Wi-Fi for students and even labs with minimum equipment with the majority of them are not properly under working conditions. No Wi-Fi connection is available for computer system in any computer labs. Only 80% of class strength can be accommodated in any lab, and library with no proper books or materials available. The quality of hostel food is average. No encouragement for the 1st and 2nd year students in sports activities. I've not seen any sick room or first aid room not even any medicine for students with sickness they just tell to go hospital.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college environment and infrastructure are good.

content.Placements: There are average placements in our college. TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and others. Software engineering, web developer, designer, call center, etc., roles are provided. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA. The highest package is 12 LPA. 20 people got internships from our college.
content.Infrastructure: The course provides important content and other activities. Classrooms are very clean. Labs and other things are also so good. The mess provides the required food, good water, and others. Sports are provided in holidays.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at St. Mary's Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by St. Mary's Group of Institutions are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at St. Mary's Group of Institutions goes up to 3985.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in St. Mary's Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
St. Mary's Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination.

Candidate  must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject.

Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognized as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Educ

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with many placement offers and a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: For my B.Tech AIML course, the college provides a hostel with long rooms and delicious food. The facilities and infrastructure available for my course and department include a computer lab, Wi-Fi, a library, quality food from the canteen, sports, games, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied because of our faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel accommodation is neat and clean. The rooms are awesome, with 24/7 CCTV monitored. The food is nice and tasty, with different items provided. The hostel wardens are good in manner. Our hostel provides Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. The mess and canteen provide different types of meals. Games are conducted two times a year, which is helpful for students. Sports and cultural activities are also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It is really satisfied with faculty members and fee structure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice. More than 10 buildings are there. Mess quality is neat and good. Hostel has a homely feel. High security is there in college and has a gym. There is a swimming pool for the campus hostel students and it is always clean and neat. Many workers are there, if any problem is there solve it fastly.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with teaching techniques and very low placement records.
reviews.review_text: Our department has no Wi-Fi for students and even labs with minimum equipment with the majority of them are not properly under working conditions. No Wi-Fi connection is available for computer system in any computer labs. Only 80% of class strength can be accommodated in any lab, and library with no proper books or materials available. The quality of hostel food is average. No encouragement for the 1st and 2nd year students in sports activities. I've not seen any sick room or first aid room not ...

reviews.review_heading: The college environment and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The course provides important content and other activities. Classrooms are very clean. Labs and other things are also so good. The mess provides the required food, good water, and others. Sports are provided in holidays.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has value for money.
reviews.review_text: Labs are okay, but Wi-Fi is not available in all the labs.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and average placement.
reviews.review_text: There is not sufficient Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are very nice and now modified as digital classes. The library also contains a lot of books, and it is a very huge and peaceful place in the overall campus. Other facilities are available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Perfection, Simplicity, and Discipline.
reviews.review_text: The whole college has its own private Wi-Fi, and every floor has its own Wi-Fi. Many labs are there for practicals and a better understanding for students. The canteen of the college is clean and good, perfect. The college has sports and events perfectly.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and has a good environment, large playground, classrooms, and a large central library. The mess and hostel are average, food is also good. College conducts sports games and cultural events, and medical facilities are available, with a separate room for it.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for studies as it has the best faculty and is great at maintaining discipline.
reviews.review_text:
Hostel facilities around the college have lots of pg hoises separate for boys and girls. 
Disciplines are maintained, and rules are followed. 
Food and cleanliness are maintained. 
Ac rooms are also available, though slightly pricey.
Three or four beds are present in each room, with proper neatness maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Real-life review to help you choose a college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, but the downside is they haven’t repainted the buildings in 7 years, making them look dull. The library is huge and good enough to meet students' needs. The labs are okay, but some classrooms have broken boards and benches, which is unacceptable.

reviews.review_heading: The topmost college for emerging technologies.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college include clean bathrooms, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of food in our hostel, mess, and canteen is available on time. Medical facilities, sports, and games are organized in March and April.

reviews.review_heading: My campus life in St. Mary .
reviews.review_text: My college atmosphere is very cool. It has huge acres of land and lab facilities like a computer lab, a chemical lab, and industrial labs. The hostel has different rooms for both girls and boys, good food and a hygienic mess hall for the students .

reviews.review_heading: Torchbearers are made at St. Mary's College.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure available for our course was good. Facilities are better; labs and classrooms are available for students. Morning tiffin to night dinner food was nice. The college provides good facilities for students. Canteens are very helpful to students. On Sunday, we spend time on the ground playing games.

reviews.review_heading: The best life-changing college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities we have are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library for each and every department. The quality of the facility in our hostel is good, and the cleanliness of the canteen and mess will be a lot different. The medical kit will be available 24 hours a day.

highlights.summary: ShriRam College of Pharmacy, ShriRam Group of Colleges is an institute. ShriRam College of Pharmacy, ShriRam Group of Colleges is approved by PCI and AICTE and offers a total of 4 courses at UG and PG levels in 2 specialisations such as Pharmaceutical and Pharmacology. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.Pharma, M.Pharma and D.Pharma in Full Time mode. ShriRam College of Pharmacy, ShriRam Group of Colleges fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 1,50,000 to 2,40,000. ShriRam College of Pharmacy, ShriRam Group of Colleges has an annual seat intake of 190 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good with a great staff.

review_content.Placements: 50% students got placed from this college. The highest package offered is 12 LPA and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Byjus Education, Mankind, cipla, alkums Pharmaceutical Limited, etc. are the top recruiting companies. 90% students got internship. Pharmaceutical industries jobs, marketing, sales jobs, HR, Academic, QA and QC, Medical representative in pharma company, etc. are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: A Library is available for students. Wi-Fi is also available at 5G speed. Labs are good with lab assistants. Canteen and medical facilities are also available in the college. Games and sports facilities are available for the students. Saturday is reserved as games and sports day.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is a waste of money. I suggest not taking admission to this college.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students was approximately 45%. The lowest salary package being offered by colleges was Rs. 12,000 per month and the highest salary package was Rs. 17,000 per month. There is no best company in our college for placements. They always invite local companies. The main thing is that they never provide an internship to a student.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has no good management for the hostel. Because there is a lack of mess, they don't even have a warden in the hostel. They don't provide any air-conditioners. They don't have any mess in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Best College for Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: This college has a 98 percent placement chance in India and a 67 percent placement chance in international countries. This college is the world's 7th best college because they provide quality education and content. If you want to succeed in your life, this college is for you.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is very clean and beautiful, providing free Wi-Fi and free books, and also offering hygienic food. They care for your health and are a budget-friendly college. I recommend you take admission in this college; I think this is the best college in India.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college campus is good with good teachers.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students were placed in the pharmaceutical industry the previous year. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Zydus, Cipla, Mankind, Alkums, Byjus, etc. About 90% of students got internships at OSR Trust. Top roles offered are digital marketing, quality assurance, and quality control.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is well designed with high-speed internet. The library has enough books and journals. A canteen is also available inside the campus with a lot of hygienic foods. The campus has medical facilities with well-trained doctors and pharmacists. Games and sports are also available on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good future from Shi Ram Collage.

review_content.Placements: Currently, I am in my 3rd year in B.Pharma so I know a lot about my college which is at Bamore. This is a normal college for students, not that high but good for B. Pharma so I will recommend this. Now, the completion in the B. Pharma is not that high compared to B.Tech. We have a high chance of getting placed. Some of my seniors also got placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall campus is big and great to enjoy. We have many places to spend free time. There are separate buildings for each course block so overall it's big and beautiful. My campus has a decent size. We have a hostel with mess. Library is also available to get books.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is a waste of money. I suggest not taking admission to this college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students was approximately 45%. The lowest salary package being offered by colleges was Rs. 12,000 per month and the highest salary package was Rs. 17,000 per month. There is no best company in our college for placements. They always invite local companies. The main thing is that they never provide an internship to a student.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has no good management for the hostel. Because there is a lack of mess, they don't even have a warden in the hostel. They don't provide any air-conditioners. They don't have any mess in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best College for Pharmacy.

content.Placements: This college has a 98 percent placement chance in India and a 67 percent placement chance in international countries. This college is the world's 7th best college because they provide quality education and content. If you want to succeed in your life, this college is for you.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is very clean and beautiful, providing free Wi-Fi and free books, and also offering hygienic food. They care for your health and are a budget-friendly college. I recommend you take admission in this college; I think this is the best college in India.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college campus is good with good teachers.

content.Placements: About 70% of students were placed in the pharmaceutical industry the previous year. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Zydus, Cipla, Mankind, Alkums, Byjus, etc. About 90% of students got internships at OSR Trust. Top roles offered are digital marketing, quality assurance, and quality control.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is well designed with high-speed internet. The library has enough books and journals. A canteen is also available inside the campus with a lot of hygienic foods. The campus has medical facilities with well-trained doctors and pharmacists. Games and sports are also available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good future from Shi Ram Collage.

content.Placements: Currently, I am in my 3rd year in B.Pharma so I know a lot about my college which is at Bamore. This is a normal college for students, not that high but good for B. Pharma so I will recommend this. Now, the completion in the B. Pharma is not that high compared to B.Tech. We have a high chance of getting placed. Some of my seniors also got placements.
content.Infrastructure: The overall campus is big and great to enjoy. We have many places to spend free time. There are separate buildings for each course block so overall it's big and beautiful. My campus has a decent size. We have a hostel with mess. Library is also available to get books.

college_info.intro:
JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research offers postgraduate, certificate and PhD programmes in several disciplines. The popular programmes at JISIASR include MSc and MTech, offered at the PG level. Most of the MSc and MTech courses are offered in full-time mode, for a duration of two years. The MSc programme is offered in various specialisations such as Microbiology, Paint & Coating Technology, Polymer Science & Technology, Chemistry, and others. Whereas, the MTech programme is offered in several branches such as Computer Science & Engineering and Data Science, among others.
JISIASR offers a research-based and industry-centric curriculum to prepare students for all the industry challenges. The institute boasts state-of-the-art laboratories for advanced research and offers strong placement assistance to students. The JIS Institute of Advanced Research and Studies collaborates with many academic institutes and industries to organise various academic training programmes and to generate internship opportunities for students.
Students can explore the listed programs offered by JISIASR for the 2025-26 academic session and embark on your journey to a future-proof career in the industry or academia.
Candidates can check the JISIASR popular programmes along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research provides numerous PG, diploma and PhD programmes in the streams of Data Science, Health Science & Technology, Interdisciplinary Sciences, and Renewable & Sustainable Energy Studies. At the PG level, JISIASR offers MSc and MTech programmes in various specialisations. Through its different centres, the institute offers a PhD programme in several areas of research such as bioinformatics, microbiology, medicinal chemistry, renewable energy & applications, and data science applications, among others. Some of the popular MSc specialisations offered at JISIASR Kolkata are mentioned below:

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seat intake of PhD courses at JISIASR, JIS University is 40. The institute offers over ten specialisations under PhD courses. Candidates should pass MSc/MTech/BTech or other relevant degrees are eligible to apply for admission. After the fulfillment of the eligibility criteria, candidates have to visit the official website of JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research to apply online.
faqs.question: What is the seat intake for PhD at JISIASR, JIS University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, JISIASR, JIS University requires at least 50% aggregate in MSc/BE/BTech/MTech/MPharm. If any student passes another entrance-level exam related to the field, they are also eligible for the course. The institute accepts various National Level Exams for admission to PhD courses including SIR/UGC/DBT/ICMR/GATE/INSPIRE/ JGEEBILS / RGNF.So if any candidates want admission to JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research for PhD course they must have 50% in under graduation or post-graduation degree.
faqs.question: Can I do a PhD with 40% graduation in JISIASR, JIS University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, there is no entrance exam needed for admission to JISIASR, JIS University. The institute offers merit-based admission. If applicants want admission to PG courses they must complete graduation degree with 50% aggregate. Additionally,  applicants who want admission to PhD courses in the JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research must have MSc/ MTech/ BTech or equivalent with a 50% aggregate score. Further, the college also accepts various National Levels exams which include CSIR/UGC/DBT/ICMR/GATE/INSPIRE/ JGEEBILS / RGNF.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to JISIASR, JIS University?

reviews_list.review_title: Amazing faculty, research focused curriculum, state of the art infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Everyone in my group got either great internship options with an option to hire or was provided with good research opportunities. The highest package in terms of the internship was around 3.6 lpa. Most of the recruiting were done by vista intelligence Pvt Limited.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is outfitted with Wi-Fi as well as fully airconditioned classrooms. The labs have well-maintained computers, software, and a number of other equipment. The labs are well developed and maintained and there is a pantry available but sadly no canteen options for the time being.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great college with the best faculty members from ISI and IIT.

review_content.Placements: Placements are 100%, and already 1st-year students got selected for internships in a data science-based company. You get an average salary of Rs. 40,000 to 60,000 per month after completing the course from this institute, which is very good for freshers to start in the market.
review_content.Infrastructure: The institute is centrally air-conditioned, and they have an awesome infrastructure. You get good access to all books from the library, and the labs are decently maintained with the latest technology both in the data science and biotech side. Faculty members and infrastructure are good, which is required for any student.

review_summary.college_name: JISIASR Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Polymer Science and Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a unique research institute in eastern India, and it provides huge opportunities.

content.Placements: Institute is relatively new, but it has got tie-ups with premier institutes and universities in India and abroad like IIT Kharagpur, Mahatma Gandhi University, Pohang Institute of Technology, South Korea, etc., and other Industries like IPA, rubber industries, pharmaceutical industries, etc. So there are high chances of getting placed in these reputed industries and universities after completion of the course. Some students already got placed as research interns.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories are well-equipped with high tech instruments which are helpful for students and researchers to carry out their research works. The institute is well-equipped with computer labs and wet labs. Classrooms are good here. There is a centralised Wi-Fi system. The JIS University have dedicated hostels for their students, and there are a lot of PGs in the vicinity of the institute at Salt Lake. So, finding any living accommodations would not be an issue here.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Polymer Science and Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The placements are quite good here. The college has collaborations with national and international universities and industries like IITs, IPA, and MG University. It also has collaboration with different Korean universities. They provide internships also.
content.Infrastructure: The institute is well structured. Labs with modern instruments and classrooms with modern facilities are available. High-speed Wi-Fi is available. Labs have hi-tech, new and costly instruments. There is also an online and offline library. Overall, it is very good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Amazing faculty, research focused curriculum, state of the art infrastructure.

content.Placements: Everyone in my group got either great internship options with an option to hire or was provided with good research opportunities. The highest package in terms of the internship was around 3.6 lpa. Most of the recruiting were done by vista intelligence Pvt Limited.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is outfitted with Wi-Fi as well as fully airconditioned classrooms. The labs have well-maintained computers, software, and a number of other equipment. The labs are well developed and maintained and there is a pantry available but sadly no canteen options for the time being.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college with the best faculty members from ISI and IIT.

content.Placements: Placements are 100%, and already 1st-year students got selected for internships in a data science-based company. You get an average salary of Rs. 40,000 to 60,000 per month after completing the course from this institute, which is very good for freshers to start in the market.
content.Infrastructure: The institute is centrally air-conditioned, and they have an awesome infrastructure. You get good access to all books from the library, and the labs are decently maintained with the latest technology both in the data science and biotech side. Faculty members and infrastructure are good, which is required for any student.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Medical Biotechnology and Bioinformatics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The teaching faculty and supporting staff are excellent.

content.Placements: The companies having MoUs with our institute include Tata Medical Centre, and also academic institutes like IIT Kharagpur, IIEST Shibpur etc. Relatively, all the students are given internships. The roles offered in the course include quality control, HPLC handling, wet lab technician, sequencing operator etc.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with all the essential features required for smart learning. The whole institute is enabled with high-speed Wi-Fi. Both the books and hard copies of any part of the course are available in the library. All kinds of medical first-line help is available.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty care and good hospitality.

review_content.Placements: In my Bachelor of Dental Studies, GITAM College helps us build a bright future with many opportunities. Nearly 90% of students get internship opportunities in oromaxillary surgery. The college has good professors. The highest and lowest packages depend on our brilliance.
review_content.Infrastructure: Moral pathology, pedodontics, conservative dentistry, radiology, and many other facilities are available on my college campus. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. The infrastructure of the hostel is a bit average. We have a Mother Teresa auditorium. overview_faqs.question: Is Daswani Dental College and Research Centre worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: Daswani Dental College and Research Centre is a distinguished institution offering MDS, BDS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Daswani Dental College and Research Centre is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Daswani Dental College and Research Centre has received an impressive review rating of 3.73 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3.67 for Campus Life, 3.67 for Placements, 3.67 for Faculty, and 3.67 for Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the current fee structure for courses at Daswani Dental College and Research Centre?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees structure for programs offerred by the Daswani Dental College and Research Centre is INR 600000 - INR 1950000.

review_summary.college_name: Daswani Dental College and Research Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied by the college.

content.Placements: About 100 students get placed every year. The average package lies between INR 50,000 and INR 100,000. The highest one can get is about INR 1000000. There are various hospitals that require a dental surgeon, including emergency rooms. The top roles offered are dental supervisor, emergency, minor, and major.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are pretty big. Library, Wi-Fi, computer lab, microbiology lab, pathology lab, mess, canteen, medical shop, etc. are available. The quality of food is good in both the mess and the canteen. Basketball court, volleyball court, football ground, Cricket ground, and CCTV are present.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and teachers are good, hostel is disappointing, and campus is huge.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 100% of students are placed in each batch. The salary package is not offered at any of our BDS colleges. We have to open a clinic or find a government job. The college provides you with enough education to open a clinic. The college may have some staff seats available if you have good knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi or gym facilities are not available in the boys' hostel. Each room has two students. Rooms with attached bathrooms or common bathrooms are available. Both facilities have different charges. The infrastructure of hostels is not very satisfactory. The canteen is small and the mess food is average.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the course but the location of campus is at far distance.

content.Placements: The College offers internship after completing the course. It is a one year internship. The batch consists of 100 students. Each divided into 10 groups for internship. Each batch is posted in the given branches of dentistry to master it. Patient flow is also good.
content.Infrastructure: The College has great infrastructure and campus. It has various departments designed to showcase each branch of dentistry. The hostels are also good. College also provides mess facility. The College also provides grounds for various sports activities.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to take admission.

content.Placements: Our college provides an opportunity to become a gentle doctor. They teach us a lot. I recommend students who want to complete their graduation and become a dentist to opt for this college.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus has a huge space. There are 24x7 facilities of anything like food, water supply and personal hostels for students. They have a well-arranged library which I like the most. Our college is the topmost in Kotak Rajasthan, and I recommend this college to others. The environment at our college is also good.
content.Faculty: Nowadays, the requirement of a doctor is more, and the dentist is not a bad job. The dentist is respected and honoured personal in society, and also the dentist can earn a good amount of money.

There is a good doctor and medical facilities. It provides great encouragement to sports and games with a great ground facility. The library has a great collection of books.

Admission to the programmes are primarilyentrance-based. TheUniversity of Agricultural Sciencesadmissions are currently ongoing. The university provides the courses through its constituent colleges located in Karnataka. Interested students can read the following article to know the detailed admission process of the university.
The University accepts admissions to most of its courses based on the entrance exams. All of the courses offered are through regular and full-time modes. Find below the key highlights foradmissions:

The fee is inclusive of several components such as tuition fee, medical insurance, lab fee, etc. Some of the components need to be paid only once, while the remaining can be paid either semester-wise or yearly. The candidates must pay the admission fee in order to confirm admission. Interested students can refer to the following table to know more aboutUAS Bangalore feesfor some of its popular courses:

Theadmission processis inclusive of multiple steps, such as application, selection and subsequent admission confirmation. Students must ensure that they fulfil the admission criteria before applying for the desired programme. As admissions are entrance-based for most of the university's offered courses, students need to appear and secure a cut-off in the accepted entrance exams. For a detailed procedure, students can refer to the following steps to completeadmission process:

The process starts with applying for the desired course. Interested candidates can visit the official website of the university and fill out the prescribed form by providing details such as name, phone number, address, educational qualifications, entrance exam score, etc.

The university shortlists the candidates based on their performance in the accepted entrance exams, such as Karnataka PGCET, ICAR AIEEA, KCET, etc. Additionally, UAS Bangalore also reserves seats for students belonging to agricultural backgrounds. Post-application, students will be selected based on their performance in the entrance exams along with other parameters. Students also need to appear for the relevant counselling (if applicable) to secure their seat at the university.
Once the shortlisting has been done, the students need to pay the admission fee and go through the verification process (if applicable) to complete the admission process.

courses_data.name: UAS Bangalore BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: University of Agricultural Sciences offers students a four-year undergraduate degree inBachelor of Scienceacross a variety of specialisations. The university accepts admissions to the BSc course on the basis of valid scores obtained by the candidates in the entrance tests, such as ICAR AIEEA and KCET. Interested applicants must fulfill the basic eligibility of clearing Class 12 or its equivalent in the Science stream with a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board to getUAS Bangalore BSc admission.

faqs.question: Is ICAR AIEEA compulsory for admission to BSc Hons courses at UAS Bangalore?
faqs.answer: No, ICAR AIEEA is not mandatory for enroling into UAS Bangalore BSc Hons courses. The primary exam accepted by the university is KCET. For a few courses, the university accepts IACR AIEEA scores also. Other than this, as per an official document, the university may also accept CUET scores. Students who are seeking admission based on KCET scores must also take part in the subsequent KCET counselling process.

faqs.question: Where can a candidate check University of Agricultural Sciences, Bangalore cutoff 2023?
faqs.answer: Candidates can check the University of Agricultural Sciences, Bangalore cutoff 2023 on shiksha. This websites provide information on the previous year's ranks, cutoff trends for various courses, and expected cutoffs for the current year. KEA (Karnataka Examinations Authority) also releases the cutoff marks for Karnataka B.Sc Agriculture admission, which can be checked on their official website.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee structure for the UAS Bangalore BSc Hons?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the UAS Bangalore BSc courses isINR 2.7 lakh. Other than this, students who wish to reside in hostels are also charged hostel fees. To know the other fees, candidates are advised to visit the official website of the university.Note:The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

faqs.question: At what stage do I need to pay the first installment of UAS Bangalore BSc (H) fees?
faqs.answer: Once all the UAS Bangalore BSc seats are allocated, students are required to pay the first installment of the fees to confirm their seat. At this stage, students are usually required to pay the first installment of the tuition fees. Apart from this, they may also be required to pay a one-time fee to secure their admission.

faqs.question: Can I join University of Agricultural Sciences, Bangalore without KCET?
faqs.answer: KCET scores are required for admission to the University of Agricultural Sciences, Bangalore for most courses, including B.Sc.The University admits students to Bachelor's degree programs through KEA-CET by following the Government of Karnataka / ICAR guidelines/norms/roaster.It appears that KCET is a mandatory requirement for admission to UAS Bangalore.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission in UAS Bangalore for BSc?
faqs.answer: No, UAS Bangalore BSc Hons admissions are entrance-based. The university accepts valid KCET scores for admission to its BSc courses. Students seeking admission to this programme must register and appear for the aforementioned exam. Based on these scores, students are ranked and allocated a seat via KCET counselling. Apart from KCET, the university accepts ICAR AIEEA scores for few courses.

placement_data.title: University of Agricultural Sciences Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: University of Agricultural Sciences has not released the placement details for the Class of 2025. The University has released the NIRF report 2025 which includes the placement details for batch 2024. According to the report, 147 UG 4 year students were placed out of the total 882 graduated students during University of Agricultural Sciences placements 2024 with a median package of INR 6.25 LPA . In PG 2 year program , 124 students of batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 8.2 LPA. Further, 6 students from the PG 5 year batch 2024 secured placements with the median salary of INR 4.8 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of University of Agricultural Sciences, Bangalore in the recent past include ITC, Sula Vineyards, Akshaya Kalpa, etc.

faqs.question: What career prospects can I expect after completing MBA from UAS Bangalore?
faqs.answer: UAS Bangalore offers a comprehensive MBA course. This course is offered with a single specialisation, i.e., Agribusiness Management. Upon graduating from the course, students can apply for job profiles. Moreover, prospective career choices and expected salary also depend on students' skill sets and competencies. The below list shows a few career options and respective industry-based average payouts for MBA in Agribusiness Management graduates: Agribusiness Manager – INR 6 to 10 LPA Supply Chain Manager – INR 7 to 12 LPA Rural Marketing Manager – INR 5 to 8 LPA Procurement Manager – INR 6 to 9 LPA Commodity Trader – INR 7 to 14 LPA Agri-Finance Manager – INR 6 to 11 LPA Farm Manager – INR 4 to 7 LPA

faqs.question: How good are the BSc Hons placements at University of Agricultural Sciences?
faqs.answer: University of Agricultural Sciences is yet to release the course-specific placement data for BSc Hons departments. In the meantime, students can check out the NIRF report released by the university. As per the report, a total of 104 UG four-year students were placed during the 2023 placements. Moreover, the median salary offered to UG four-year students stood at INR 5.5 LPA . Note: It is to be noted that the above placement data is not course-specific. It has been fetched from the official NIRF report. Moreover, the data is only for UG four-year courses offered by the university.

faqs.question: How are the placements for agriculture course in UAS University Bangalore?
faqs.answer: UAS University Bangalore has a good placement ratio in agriculture courses. The placement rate at this college for agriculture courses is around 60 percent. The college conducts both on-campus and off-campus placements.

nirf.description:
UAS Bangalore has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for UAS Bangalore indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, UAS Bangalore's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, UAS Bangalore fell 5 ranks to #95 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'State Public University' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, UAS Bangalore climbed 7 ranks to #37 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, UAS Bangalore's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, UAS Bangalore fell 210 ranks to #661 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been recognized that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, UAS Bangalore fell 77 ranks to #202 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MSc in Nalanda Open University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the MSc programme at Nalanda Open University is 11.2 K per semester. Students applying at NOU should possess a Bachelor's degree or its equivalent in an allied discipline from a recognised institute or university. NOU MSc admission process is merit-based. The application process can be started by visiting the official website of the university.

overview_faqs.question: Does Nalanda Open University provide a valid university degree?
overview_faqs.answer: Nalanda Open University is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC), the Ministry of HRD, the Government of India and the Distance Education Bureau (DEB). NOU is also a member of the Association of Indian Universities (AIU), the International Council of Open and Distance Education (ICDE) and the Asian Association of Open Universities (AAOU). Additionally, Nalanda Open University was established in 1987 under the ACT of Bihar Government, Nalanda Open University (NOU).

overview_faqs.question: What are the good and bad sides of studying in Nalanda Open University?
overview_faqs.answer: Nalanda Open University has several pros and cons of studying for various students. The good and bad sides are given below:Good side of studying at NOU:In comparison to other regular universities, NOU is affordable in terms of everything. The tuition fee, along with other fee components is lower.The system of distance learning is flexible for students living in different parts of the nation.NOU offers UG, PG, Diploma and Certificate courses across various specialisations. All these courses are recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and Distance Education Council (DEC). Bad sides of studying at NOU:Due to the distance learning mode, students lack interaction with the faculty. This can impact the learning experience of students. Open universities such as NOU Bihar and Patna IGNOU often lack placement opportunities, practical training and exposure. Students miss out on extra-curricular activities, vibrant college life, fests, events, internships and seminars.

review_summary.college_name: Nalanda Open University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: An excellent course offered by NOU.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in History - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best faculties; good books are provided for students, who are preparing for UPSC.

content.Placements: Placements are not available. You may become a professor or an IAS officer, if you choose this course.
content.Infrastructure: College provides you free books and assignment. There aren't any classes provided for under graduation students. It is available only for post-graduation or above. This is a distance learning course, so there aren't any hostels and canteens.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very good and knowledgeable. Exams are tough. If you want to get marks, you have to study hard. For exams, you have to study through the books.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Hindi - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has knowledgeable faculty members, but it does not offer placements.

content.Placements: Not a single student got placement from our course. No companies came to campus for recruitment. No students get the chance to work in companies. No roles are offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a library, Wi-Fi services, and study materials. Mess is not available at this institute. It is just an open university that provides distance education in many courses.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable and supportive by nature. They guide students regarding their futures. There are many courses, like B.Sc. in agriculture, computer courses, and technical courses, for students to get knowledge in their respective fields. Semester exams are not that tough, and the pass percentage is 85%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The experience is satisfying and good.

content.Placements: The college do not provide any placements, but only a degree for further education and career enhancements. BBA course can get you a management job, analyst job, etc.
content.Infrastructure: CCTV surveillance, big classrooms, library facility are available in the campus. It doesn’t provide any hostel, medical, or sports facilities. It is a distance education university. You are required to visit the college campus during exams. Exams are easy and usually 3 hours long, with strict monitoring.
content.Faculty: Notes are provided. The difficulty level of exams is 6/10 for BBA course. The university provides study notes in its website. The students can also download the files from the student portal from website.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Geography - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: NOU is the best open University.

content.Placements: There were 300 students in my department. About 10000 students or may be above got placed from my college. The placements were overall good. The placement starts from 1 to 2 LPA. The top recruiting company is HCL and other banks.
content.Infrastructure: There are no good facilities in my hostel. I have never used the Wi-Fi of the college so I cannot say about it. But the classes were so neat and clean. They were advance classes. Students also respect their teachers in this college.

admission_overview.college_name: Nalanda Open University Admission 2026 (NOU): Eligibility, Application, Fee & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: Nalanda Open University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Nalanda Open University admissions are merit-based and students don't have to appear for any entrance exams/ interviews. Also known as NOU, the open university offers programmes across different fields of study. Some of these are Arts, Science, Management, Commerce, etc. For admission, apply through the official website. The mode of education is distance learning for all courses. The admission and application process for the courses offered at the university is conducted both offline and online. The Nalanda Open University Student Login can be accessed at the official website of the university. Students can read the following sections to know in-depth about NOU admission-related details.

eligibility_selection.title: Nalanda Open University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The Nalanda Open University offers over 15 courses across an extensive range of specialisations and fields. Students can pursue UG, PG, Doctoral and Certificate courses at the university. The programmes are offered through distance and online modes. Nalanda Open University course admissions are offered based on the scores secured in the last qualifying exam. However, For B.Ed, students are selected based on marks in Bihar B.Ed CET. The general eligibility for Nalanda Open University courses is as below: The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popular NOU courses:

faqs.answer: Yes, you can join Nalanda Open University UG-level courses directly after Class 12 resuts are announced. Students are selected based on academic merit only. For admission to courses, such as BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, BCom, and more, you may apply after Class 12 is completed.
faqs.question: Can I join Nalanda Open University directly after Class 12?

faqs.answer: No, CUET is not required for Nalanda Open University admissions. The university is an Open University and offers courses through online and distance learning mode. Hence, no selection rounds are conducted. Students can apply simply by completing the Class 12/ Graduation as per the course.
faqs.question: Is CUET required for Nalanda Open University admission?

faqs.answer: Nalanda Open University selection criteria is merit-based only. The university offers seats to all the students who submit a completed application before the last date. There is no entrance test or interview for selection. For B.Ed however, students may have to sit for the Bihar B.Ed CET.
faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for Nalanda Open University?

paragraphs: Nalanda Open University akaNOU Biharis one of the most popular open universities offering distance learning. Candidates seeking admission to NOU for distance and online education can apply online on the official website. After the applications are submitted, the forms are scrutinised and admission is offered on a first-come first-served basis.Nalanda Open University admission processis as follows:
NOU Application Process 2026

Intersted students can go to the official site ofNalanda Open University, Biharand register onNOU student login portal. The applications can be submitted only after the form is filled with all the mandatory details and the undertaking has been signed off. To submit the form, students have to submit documents and pay the application fees.
NOU Selection Process 2026

In order to be admitted to Nalanada Open University, students need to meet the last educational qualification as per course requirements. The university accepts applicants as long as they meet the eligibility requirements of the course and apply within the given timeline.
Admission Confirmation 2026

Once the university communicates that the student is shortlisted, students are required to pay the course admission fee to confirm their seat at the university. The shortlisted students must pay the required charges in full at the time of admission. The payment must be made through a demand draft in favour of Nalanda Open University, payable at Patna.
NOU Important Information PDF

Nalanda Open University tuition feevaries as per the programme selected by the student. The university offers a discount of25% for women candidates on all course fees. Aspirants need to qualify for the respective entrance exam with a valid score and have a proven teaching experience of two years to pursue this course from NOU. Admission to the course is entrance-based and requires students to appear for the entrance test conducted by the concerned authoritiy. Hence, students must appear and clear the exam to secure their seat at the university for the B.Ed programme. reviews.review_heading: An excellent course offered by NOU.
Best faculties; good books are provided for students, who are preparing for UPSC.
reviews.review_text: College provides you free books and assignment. There aren't any classes provided for under graduation students. It is available only for post-graduation or above. This is a distance learning course, so there aren't any hostels and canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has knowledgeable faculty members, but it does not offer placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a library, Wi-Fi services, and study materials. Mess is not available at this institute. It is just an open university that provides distance education in many courses.

reviews.review_heading: The experience is satisfying and good.
reviews.review_text: CCTV surveillance, big classrooms, library facility are available in the campus. It doesn’t provide any hostel, medical, or sports facilities. It is a distance education university. You are required to visit the college campus during exams. Exams are easy and usually 3 hours long, with strict monitoring.

reviews.review_heading: NOU is the best open University.
reviews.review_text: There are no good facilities in my hostel. I have never used the Wi-Fi of the college so I cannot say about it. But the classes were so neat and clean. They were advance classes. Students also respect their teachers in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good way to get a degree, if you are pursuing any other course along with it.
reviews.review_text: An open university isn't a college specifically, but if you need its books, you can get it from Shadaqt Aashram, where NOU is available. Only get a degree from here if you are willing to do something great with your life by saving time.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place for learning.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-equipped with modern science and computer labs.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are very good here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here. All facilities are also good like Wi-Fi, laboratory, canteen and many more. There is a good building, and the canteen is very good. The washroom is very hygienic, and the auditorium is good. The entire campus is under safety, and the cameras and security of the college are good. So, the college is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best option for those who are preparing for other competitive examinations.
reviews.review_text: The university office is located on the second floor, Biscomann Tower, Patna. The classrooms are not well-maintained at all. The university allotts these classrooms as examination centre, but the chairs and the benches are in dilapidated condition.

reviews.review_heading: It helps in distance learning, but course material, teachers and not having hostels may disappoint.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available for students but available for staff members. Students have to seek private lodges to stay, which can be easily found nearby college. Students have to visit a private mess or bring their own food. Some medical facilities are available, but there are no sports or games. The library is well established, and students can visit it if needed.

reviews.review_heading: Really tough Course curriculum.
reviews.review_text: This is an Open University, So the studies are more of "distance learning programme" than a brick and mortar college. However, you should really know the offices as this will be really helpful in filling the form as well as knowing the dates. As you may sometime require to fill the form in a real hurry.

reviews.review_heading: The best open university in Patna.
reviews.review_text: This institute is situated on the 3rd floor of Patna's biggest building named Biscouman Bhavan. The campus is very clean with almost all facilities like labs, library, smart classrooms, fully air-conditioned seminar halls. Even the view outside is wonderful.

reviews.review_heading: This University offer variety of courses, but faculty members are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is below average, and the fee is affordable. This college is good for the students who have no time to attend regular classes and who can not afford expensive tuition fee. I would recommend this college for the students who want to get a degree certificate but not to gain the knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied as the college met all my expectations.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are in good condition, but they are helpful, only if they are useful for practicals too. The library is good and has the sufficient number of books. The college doesn't provide any sports and games facility. The college doesn't even provide any medical facility, but an ambulance is provided in case of an emergency.

reviews.review_heading: The best college to pursue higher education alongside your job or business.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is located in Biscomaan Bhawan, Patna., and the building of this college is the tallest building in Patna. The campus is enabled with Wi-Fi facility, and there are many classrooms. There are smart facilities all over the campus, and all the works are done through the internet. There is a branch of Indian Bank on the ground floor.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Nalanda Open University - NOU

likes.text: The college do not provide any placements, but only a degree for further education and career enhancements.

review_content.General: This college offers only MBBS courses and some diploma courses in surgery, gynecology. In a medical college, there are no placements or recruitment. The internships are done with SK Government hospital which is the biggest hospital in Shekhawati region.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is great. It is one of the best campuses in Rajasthan. All the basic medical college facilities are provided like a dissection hall and laboratories. There is a big library attached with a big reading room. Hostels are also good, and each student has separate room.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A good government college in city of education -sikar of Rajasthan.

review_content.Placements: This is my first session in this college. So right now I have no knowledge about its placement and internship courses but yes the college head has approved that within few years they will add the PG course also along with a attach hospital of 300 beds in which students can practice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of my college is super awesome. Being a government medical college, it really looks like a private college with high tech, fully air conditioned lecture halls with digital equipment for studies. It has separate labs for every department like pharmacology, microbiology, physiology, anatomy. This college has a super big sized library and reading room for those who want peaceful place for studies. It's is having two dissection hall with proper availability of cadaver and a museum with sufficient specimen for spotting purpose. It is having separate mess area for girls, boys and faculty members which satisfy optimum food related needs with hygiene. Currently various courts for sports like (basketball, volleyball, cricket, table tennis, badminton)purpose are under construction and it will be available within 2-3 months. Then it is having two ambulance with proper medical facilities which is available 24/7 to all the needy one in the campus. Complete campus is surrounded by well grown gardens with different plants and trees. The best thing which I like about this college is that it is situated far away from major city crowd which really gives soothing vibes. Near to this college there is a proper availability of police station, medical and general store and many more shops along with transport facility. It is having separate hostels for girls and boys, resident doctors with proper facility for drinking water, lifts, recreation hall, camera for safety etc. Hostels are totally safe as there is full time duty of guards and care taker there along with proper, strict time of entry and exist along with proper entry.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: To be a good IMG, SK GMC SIKAR would be a good opportunity.

review_content.Placements: There is a batch of 100 students in this college each year. The package basically lies in a range of 65k to 95k after the completion of MBBS. Basically after completing MBBS and service bond of 2 years you can work anywhere you want. About 60% of the MBBS passout students after completing internship and service bond they work of different private sector hospital franchise or companies as general doctor.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has a great infrastructure with latest technologies.

content.Placements: As it is a government medical college, it provides you with the opportunity of an internship in its attached hospital. A multi-specialty hospital is also under construction and is to be attached to the college. The salary for the internship is around Rs. 17,000 per month to Rs. 18,000 per month. The salary for being selected as a junior resident is Rs. 50,000 per month to Rs. 60,000 per month. Salaries for the higher posts also tend to be around 1.5 lakh per month.
content.Infrastructure: The e-library is open from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. There is a study library with separate desks and charging ports, cabin-like arrangements, and separate reading rooms for combined studies. Classrooms are completely digital. Wi-Fi is available in the academic areas. The whole academic area, classroom, and library are air-conditioned. The playground has a basketball court, a volleyball court, an indoor badminton court, cricket nets, and lawn tennis. The mess has good quality food for Rs. 4,000 per month. The canteen is open 24 hours.
